# Database connection strings
# Development
DATABASE_URL=postgres://devuser:devpass123@localhost:5432/devdb
# Production (do not commit!)
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://produser:s3cur3P@ssw0rd@db.example.com:5432/proddb
MYSQL_URL=mysql://root:mysecretpassword@mysql.example.com:3306/appdb
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://mongouser:mongosecret@mongo.example.com:27017/appdb
MONGODB_SRV=mongodb+srv://user:clusterpass123@cluster0.example.mongodb.net/mydb
REDIS_URL=redis://default:redissecret123@redis.example.com:6379/0
AMQP_URL=amqp://rabbituser:rabbitsecret@rabbitmq.example.com:5672/vhost
AMQPS_URL=amqps://rabbituser:rabbitsecret@rabbitmq.example.com:5671/vhost
